sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat('WITH Planned AS (
SELECT pi.ID AS ProgressItemID
  , ISNULL(sum(hours * rocs.Percentage)/100, 0) AS PIPlannedHours							
  FROM dbo.PM_ProgressItem AS pi WITH (NOLOCK)
    LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.SP_ProgressItem_CWP  AS  picwp  WITH (NOLOCK) 
	ON pi.id = picwp.ProgressItemID
    INNER JOIN dbo.PM_ROCS AS rocs WITH (NOLOCK)	
	ON rocs.ID = picwp.ROCSID
    WHERE picwp.IsPlanned = 1
    GROUP BY pi.id 
)
, RocsSteps AS (
SELECT ROCID
	, COUNT(ID) AS TotalSteps
  FROM dbo.PM_ROCS WITH (NOLOCK)
    GROUP BY ROCID
)
, Planning AS (
SELECT ProgressItemID
	, picwp.ROCID 
	,  sum(CAST( IsPlanned AS int)) PlannedSteps
	, TotalSteps
  FROM dbo.SP_ProgressItem_CWP picwp WITH (NOLOCK)
    INNER JOIN RocsSteps rs WITH (NOLOCK)	
	ON rs.ROCID = picwp.ROCID
    GROUP BY ProgressItemID
	, picwp.ROCID
	, TotalSteps
)
, Progressed AS (
SELECT picwp.ProgressItemID
	, isnull(sum(ph.ProgressDelta),0) AS SumProgress
  FROM dbo.SP_ProgressHistory ph WITH (NOLOCK)
    INNER JOIN dbo.SP_ProgressItem_CWP picwp WITH (NOLOCK) 	
	ON ph.ProgressItemCWPID = picwp.ID
    GROUP BY  picwp.ProgressItemID
)

, ProgressStatus AS (	
SELECT pi.ID AS paprsID
	,COUNT( Distinct picwp.cwpid) AS WorkPackCount
	,CASE	WHEN SumProgress / TotalSteps = 100
			THEN','''', 'Fully Progressed','''','
		WHEN SumProgress = 0 OR SumProgress IS null
			THEN ','''','Not Progressed','''','
		ELSE ','''','Partially Progressed','''','
		END AS ProgressStatus
	,CASE WHEN plannedSteps = 0 
			THEN ','''','Not Planned','''','
		WHEN plannedSteps < TotalSteps 
			THEN ','''','Partially Planned','''','
		ELSE	','''','Fully Planned','''','
		END AS PlannedStatus
  FROM dbo.PM_ProgressItem AS pi WITH (NOLOCK)
    INNER JOIN dbo.SP_ProgressItem_CWP picwp WITH (NOLOCK)	
	ON pi.ID = picwp.ProgressItemID
    LEFT JOIN Planning pl WITH (NOLOCK)	
	ON pl.ProgressItemID = pi.id
    LEFT JOIN Progressed AS prog WITH (NOLOCK)	
	ON pi.ID = prog.ProgressItemID
    GROUP BY pi.ID
		, plannedSteps
		, TotalSteps
		, SumProgress
)',
'SELECT ',
    pipeline().parameters.p_pl_projectid,' Project_id, ',
	'''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.function_code,'''',' function_code '
	,',','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.source_name,'''',' source_name '
	,',','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_source_name,'''',' sub_source_name'
	,',','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.class_name_hours,'''',' class_name_hours '
	,',','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.class_name_quantity,'''',' class_name_quantity '
	,',','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_class_hours,'''',' sub_class_hours '
	,',','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_class_qty,'''',' sub_class_qty '
	,',','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_class_plan,'''',' sub_class_plan '
	,',','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.unit_of_measure_hours,'''',' unit_of_measure_hours '
	,',','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.unit_of_measure_qty,'''',' unit_of_measure_qty '
	,',','pi.PMID pim_code
	,r.Code roc_code
	,rs.Step ROC_Step
	,ph.Code Phase_Code
	,wa.Code WorkArea_Code
	,act.ScheduleUnit AS WorkUnit_Code
	,sr.Code ScheduleResource_Code
	,act.CWP cwp_code
	,act.Activity
	,cwp.Name iwp_Code
	,pi.Contract 
	,pi.CostCode
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.CostCodeDescription,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') costcode_desription
	,pi.CostType
	,pi.CostingCOA	
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.Description,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') Description
	,convert(date,getdate()) budget_date
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.DrawingNo,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') DrawingNo
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.TagNo,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') TagNo
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.Spool,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') Spool
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.Line,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') Line
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.spec,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') spec
	,pi.System
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.PieceMark,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') PieceMark
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.NumberOfPieces,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') NumberOfPieces
	,pi.Subsystem
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.text5,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') text5
	,replace(replace(replace(pi.Level6,char(10),','''',' ','''','),char(34),','''',' ','''','),char(13),','''',' ','''',') Level6
	,isnull(PlannedStatus, ','''','Not Planned','''',') AS PlannedStatus
	,isnull(ProgressStatus, ','''','Not Progressed','''',') AS ProgressStatus
	,sum(pi.Hours * rs.Percentage * .01) budgethours
	,sum(pi.Quantity * rs.Percentage *.01) BudgetQuantity
	,sum(ISNULL(p.PIPlannedHours, 0)*rs.Percentage*.01) AS PlannedHours
  FROM dbo.PM_ProgressItem pi WITH (NOLOCK)
    LEFT JOIN dbo.PM_Activity act  WITH (NOLOCK) 
	ON pi.ActivityID = act.ID		
    LEFT JOIN dbo.PM_ROC r WITH (NOLOCK)	
	ON pi.ROCID = r.ID
    LEFT JOIN dbo.PM_ROCS rs WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON rs.ROCID = pi.ROCID
	LEFT JOIN [dbo].[PM_ProjectMasterData] pr with (NOLOCK) ON pr.Project <> ','''','ssssss','''','
	LEFT JOIN Planned p WITH (NOLOCK)	
	ON pi.ID = p.ProgressItemID
    LEFT JOIN ProgressStatus ProgStat WITH (NOLOCK) 	
	ON pi.ID = progstat.paprsID
    LEFT JOIN dbo.SP_ProgressItem_CWP picwp WITH (NOLOCK) 	
	ON pi.ID = picwp.ProgressItemID AND rs.ROCID = picwp.ROCID AND rs.ID = picwp.ROCSID
    LEFT JOIN dbo.SP_ConstructionWorkPack cwp WITH (NOLOCK)  
	ON cwp.ID = picwp.CWPID
	LEFT JOIN [dbo].[SP_WorkArea] wa with (NOLOCK) ON act.ScheduleWorkArea = wa.Code
	LEFT JOIN [dbo].[SP_Phases] ph with (NOLOCK) ON wa.PhaseID = ph.ID
	LEFT JOIN [dbo].[SP_ScheduleResource] sr with (NOLOCK) ON cwp.ScheduleResourceID = sr.ID
    WHERE picwp.IsPlanned = 1
group by     ','''','99','''',' + ltrim(rtrim(pr.Project))
	,pi.PMID  
	,r.Code
    ,rs.Step  
	,ph.Code 
	,wa.Code
	,act.ScheduleUnit
	,sr.Code
	,act.CWP
	,act.Activity
	,cwp.Name
	,pi.Contract 
	,pi.CostCode
	,pi.CostCodeDescription
	,pi.CostType
	,pi.CostingCOA	
	,pi.Description
	,pi.DrawingNo
	,pi.TagNo
	,pi.Spool
	,pi.Line
	,pi.spec
	,pi.System
	,pi.PieceMark
	,pi.NumberOfPieces
	,pi.Subsystem
	,pi.text5
	,pi.Level6
	,isnull(PlannedStatus, ','''','Not Planned','''',')
	,isnull(ProgressStatus, ','''','Not Progressed','''',')')

activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters
activities.description: lookup the parameters needed for this pipeline

activities.name: sp_Update_Parameter
activities.description: update the appropriate parameter with revised value. i.e Last run datetime
